text:
Elderly (PACE) Services 
106 = Self-directed Personal Assistance Services under 1915(j) 
107 = In vitro diagnostic products for the detection of SARS–CoV–2 or the diagnosis of the virus that 
causes COVID–19, and the administration of such in vitro diagnostic products 
108 = COVID–19 testing-related services 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: The code definitions in the valid value list originate from the Medicaid and CHIP Program Data 
System’s (MACPro’s) benefit
